title: My Brother Jonathan
writer: Francis Brett Young, Leslie Landau, Adrian Alington
actors: Michael Denison, Dulcie Gray, Ronald Howard
plot: Doctor Jonathan Dakers in flashback tells his son Tony - a World War II veteran - about his life, dating from the 1900s. Whilst a medical student, he meets and falls for Edie. Before they can marry, Jonathan's father dies and he s...
